name: MAG-7 | 五指短剑
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted with patterned glass panels and a red grip and pump. \"Whatever you paid for this, it wasn't enough\"
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器带有红色握把和套筒，枪身绘有带图案的玻璃板。 “此枪无价”
